name: segment
description: Segment is an extensible open-source messenger with end-to-end encryption.

scripts.check: node scripts/check-syntax.js && node packages/crypto/selftest.js && node packages/protocol/selftest.js && node apps/server/src/relay.selftest.js && node apps/server/src/rooms.selftest.js && node apps/server/src/files.selftest.js && node packages/core/files.selftest.js && node packages/core/history.selftest.js
